summary: Login Bug Fix and RewardLoader Implementation VERIFIED. Both fixes working correctly.

Login with Invalid ID (1234567890).details: Shows error modal 'Account Not Found', displays red X icon, stays on step 1, does NOT proceed to PIN entry

Login with Valid ID (9970100782).details: Shows green checkmark, proceeds to step 2 (PIN entry), 'Change' button visible

ProfileAdvanced.js RewardLoader.details: Code verified: imports RewardLoader and uses <RewardLoader message='Loading profile...' /> with data-testid='reward-loader'

BankRedeemPage.js RewardLoader.details: Code verified: imports RewardLoader and uses <RewardLoader message='Loading bank redeem...' /> with data-testid='reward-loader'

ReferralsEnhanced.js RewardLoader.details: Code verified: imports RewardLoader and uses <RewardLoader message='Loading referrals...' /> with data-testid='reward-loader'

SubscriptionPlans.js RewardLoader.details: Code verified: imports RewardLoader and uses <RewardLoader message='Loading plans...' /> with data-testid='reward-loader'

Full Login Flow.details: Successfully logged in with 9970100782/997010, redirected to dashboard

critical_code_review_comments: LoginNew.js catch block (lines 140-156) correctly handles ALL errors by setting idStatus='invalid' and showing error toast
RewardLoader component has data-testid='reward-loader' for testing
All 4 user pages (Profile, BankRedeem, Referrals, Subscription) correctly import and use RewardLoader during loading state
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login bug fix verified - invalid IDs now show error and stay on step 1. RewardLoader (PRC coin animation) implemented on Profile, BankRedeem, Referrals, and Subscription pages. All pages use data-testid='reward-loader' for testing.

login_fix_verification.bug_description: When entering wrong login ID, app was proceeding to PIN entry (showing green checkmark)
login_fix_verification.fix_details: catch block now sets idStatus='invalid' for ALL errors (not just 404), preventing progression to PIN step
login_fix_verification.test_result: PASS - Invalid ID shows red X and error modal, stays on step 1

reward_loader_verification.test_result: PASS - All pages correctly import and use RewardLoader
